title: Balanced Villagers
description: Prevents villagers from changing professions after their first choice, making trade more balanced.
body:
🧑‍🌾 About Balanced Villagers
> Tired of villagers switching jobs at the last second? Balanced Villagers brings a more predictable and fair trading experience by locking a villager's profession after their first choice. Once a villager picks a workstation, they stick with it — no more constant job hopping or trade resets.

> Perfect for structured trading halls, economy-based servers, or players who want a more grounded villager system.

⚖️ Key Features
- Villagers keep their first profession permanently
- Prevents job cycling
- Adds depth and balance to trading strategies

🛠️ Compatibility
> Works seamlessly with vanilla and most villager-related mods. Lightweight and server-friendly.

📦 Great for economy servers, trading halls, or anyone who values consistency over randomness.
